name: BILL Holdings, Inc.
business: BILL Holdings provides a financial operations platform for small and midsize businesses, automating payables, receivables, and spend and expense management. The platform uses AI to connect businesses with suppliers and clients through a proprietary network.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading financial operations platform for small and midsize businesses (SMBs).
Our purpose-built, artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled financial software platform creates seamless connections between our customers, their suppliers, and their clients.

The words believe, may, will, potentially, estimate, continue, anticipate, intend, could, would, project, target, plan, expect, and similar expressions are intended to identify forward-looking statements... including... cybersecurity events.
